channel.title: Games, Toys and Collectibles for Big Children on LEGO barato - Cheap - Angebote - Cadeaux
channel.description: Recent content in Games, Toys and Collectibles for Big Children on LEGO barato - Cheap - Angebote - Cadeaux

item.title: LEGO Technic Yamaha MT-10 SP Motorbike Mode Kit for Adults to Build Authentic Motorcycle Replica Building Set with 4-Cylinder Engine Functional Steering and AR App Gift for Men & Women 42159
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Technic Yamaha MT-10 SP Motorbike Mode Kit for Adults to Build Authentic Motorcycle Replica Building Set with 4-Cylinder Engine Functional Steering and AR App Gift for Men & Women 42159 at the following link: ℹ️: A project for you or the ideal motorbike model gift for men and women Yamaha enthusiasts, this collectable motorbike model provides a rewarding build for fans of LEGO vehicles To experience a new type of highly immersive construction, you can download the LEGO Technic AR app to bring your model to life and explore it in a completely different way To add even more authenticity to this iconic LEGO motorcycle, there is also functional steering via inputs to the handlebar and a side stand Gearbox elements included in this LEGO Technic vehicle set for adults include a shift drum, a shift fork, gear shift ring and ratchet drum The collectible LEGO motorbike model features stripped-back styling that highlights the torque 4-cylinder engine, plus 3-speed transmission Build a replica of the most powerful Yamaha in the ‘hyper naked’ category with the LEGO Technic Yamaha MT-10 SP motorbike model kit for adults Show off your brick-built LEGO motorbike in your office or at home with the included display stand, in tribute to your passion for Yamaha Number of Pieces: 1,478 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO NINJAGO Elemental Dragon vs. The Empress Mech Large Building Toy Set with Dragon Toy Action Figure Ninja Flyer and 6 Minifigures Dragons Rising Series Gift for Kids Boys Girls 71796
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO NINJAGO Elemental Dragon vs. The Empress Mech Large Building Toy Set with Dragon Toy Action Figure Ninja Flyer and 6 Minifigures Dragons Rising Series Gift for Kids Boys Girls 71796 here: ℹ️: There’s also a yellow dragon power element to battle over and kids can collect 4 more in different colours in other NINJAGO building toy sets Features a dragon toy of the fearsome Jiro and a golden mech action figure with a large sword, plus a golden blade flyer vehicle with stud shooters Ready to take on the ninja are Lord Ras and his hammer, Empress Beatrix with her Imperium sword and an Imperium Guard minifigure with a staff 6 NINJAGO minifigures are featured in the large LEGO set including Jay, Sora and Zane, who come with 2 golden katana ninja toys each The posable fire dragon figure can be upgraded by adding golden blade wings and stud shooters from the flyer vehicle to take on the Empress’s mech LEGO NINJAGO Elemental Dragon vs.

item.title: LEGO Art Hokusai – The Great Wave 3D Japanese Wall Art Craft Set Framed Ocean Canvas Model Kit for Adults to Build Creative Activity for Home or Office Decor Gifts for Men and Women 31208
item.description: You can find LEGO Art Hokusai – The Great Wave 3D Japanese Wall Art Craft Set Framed Ocean Canvas Model Kit for Adults to Build Creative Activity for Home or Office Decor Gifts for Men and Women 31208 with a discount here: ℹ️: The 3D Japanese artwork makes a great home or office décor display piece, and a brilliant present for art and home design fans This home decor craft kit for adults contains 1,810 pieces, 6 canvas bases, 2 hangers elements and a decorative tile with Hokusais signature This tribute to Hokusai’s The Great Wave comes with a premium booklet with art details and instructions to guide you through the building process Relax while building this LEGO wall Art set - scan the QR code to listen to the tailor-made soundtrack end enjoy a rewarding mindful experience Bring one of the most iconic artworks of the last two centuries to life with the LEGO Art Hokusai - The Great Wave set, a DIY framed wall art piece Celebrate icons from the worlds of art, music and cinema with LEGO Art, crafts and creative activity kits for adults, and indulge in your hobbies Number of Pieces: 1,810 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO Minecraft The Sword Outpost Building Toy for Kids with Creeper Soldier Pig and Skeleton Figures Gift for Boys and Girls Aged 8 Plus Years Old 21244
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Minecraft The Sword Outpost Building Toy for Kids with Creeper Soldier Pig and Skeleton Figures Gift for Boys and Girls Aged 8 Plus Years Old 21244 at the following link: ℹ️: There are 2 stud shooters to defend the base plus a lever at the bottom of the tower triggers an explosion that collapses part of the structure Includes Sentinel Soldier, Guardian Warrior and allay LEGO Minecraft figures, plus skeleton and Creeper Minecraft mobs and a pig animal toy Once the days play is over and the base has been defended, the Minecraft diamond sword build will look great on display in kids rooms Kids build a giant toy Minecraft diamond sword base into the side of a mountain with a chill-out area, a juke box toy, a table and cookies Minecraft-loving kids explore this large recreation of the games precious weapon, the diamond sword, which acts as a base for explosive battles This Minecraft set combines with other LEGO Minecraft building toys and makes a cool birthday or any-occasion gift for kids age 8 plus years old 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO Star Wars Millennium Falcon UCS Set for Adults Model Kit to Build with Han Solo Princess Leia & Chewbacca Minifigures Plus Droid Figure Collectible Gifts for Teenagers Boys and Girls 75192
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Star Wars Millennium Falcon UCS Set for Adults Model Kit to Build with Han Solo Princess Leia & Chewbacca Minifigures Plus Droid Figure Collectible Gifts for Teenagers Boys and Girls 75192 here: ℹ️: A great set for LEGO collectors and Star Wars fans alike; this Millennium Falcon model makes a great Star Wars-themed Fathers Day gift, his or hers birthday present, anniversary surprise for husband or wife, or a special treat for yourself Exterior features include removable hull panels, a lowering boarding ramp, concealed blaster cannon, a 4-minifigure cockpit with a detachable canopy, interchangeable sensor dishes, upper and lower quad laser cannons and 7 landing legs Number of Pieces: 7,541 The Millennium Falcon Star Wars model also Includes 4 classic crew minifigures: Han Solo, Chewbacca, Princess Leia and C-3PO, plus 3 Episode VII/VIII crew minifigures: Older Han Solo, Rey and Finn and a BB-8 Star Wars droid figure Classic crew weapons include Han’s blaster pistol and Chewbacca’s stud-firing bowcaster; episode VII/VIII crew weapons include Rey’s small silver blaster and Finn’s medium blaster rifle Fans of the Galaxy far, far away can build and display the ultimate LEGO Star Wars Millennium Falcon model with this LEGO Star Wars 7,541 piece set, featuring loads of iconic details, plus crew members from the original and sequel Star Wars trilogies The LEGO Star Wars UCS model kit features a main hold features a seating area, Dejarik holographic game, a combat remote training helmet, an engineering station with a turning minifigure seat and a doorway build with passageway decoration The gunnery station on this collectible set features a minifigure gunner’s seat and a detachable hull panel with a fully rotating quad laser cannon; an additional quad laser cannon is also mounted on the underside 🛒 Buy it now!

item.title: LEGO 10255 Creator Assembly Square Set Massively Modular Model Building Kit with Shops Roof Terrace 8 Minifigures and Much More for Ages 16 Plus
item.description: You can find LEGO 10255 Creator Assembly Square Set Massively Modular Model Building Kit with Shops Roof Terrace 8 Minifigures and Much More for Ages 16 Plus with a discount here: ℹ️: Material: plastic Package dimensions (L x W x H): 58.4 x 47.6 x 17.6 cm In the middle there are: music store with drums, guitar and saxophone; photo studio and dental office. International products have separate terms, are sold from abroad and may differ from local products, including fit, age ratings, and language of product, labeling or instructions.

item.title: LEGO Architecture Statue of Liberty Model Kit for Adults to Build Collectable New York Souvenir Building Set Gift Idea for Women Men Her or Him Home Decor Creative Activity 21042
item.description: You can find LEGO Architecture Statue of Liberty Model Kit for Adults to Build Collectable New York Souvenir Building Set Gift Idea for Women Men Her or Him Home Decor Creative Activity 21042 with a discount here: ℹ️: LEGO Architecture model building kits make a magnificent birthday gifts for women and men, anniversary gifts for a wife or husband, or Christmas gift for teens, adults or any New York fan This impressive LEGO interpretation faithfully reproduces the monument’s harmonious blend of sculpture and architecture An icon of freedom, the statue was presented as a gift to the people of the United States from the people of France in 1886 Features a Lady Liberty statue with a flowing robe and an intricately detailed pedestal with shield & brick detailing and columned balconies Number of Pieces: 1,685 Finished with an authentic sand-green and beige color scheme, this model delivers a highly satisfying building experience Also includes broken shackles, 7-ray crown, iconic tablet and an upraised arm bearing a golden torch, plus a decorative nameplate 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO Minecraft The Mushroom House Set Building Toy for Kids Age 8 plus Gift Idea with Alex Mooshroom & Spider Jockey Figures 21179
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Minecraft The Mushroom House Set Building Toy for Kids Age 8 plus Gift Idea with Alex Mooshroom & Spider Jockey Figures 21179 at the following link: ℹ️: This Minecraft building toy makes a perfect birthday present idea or Minecraft gift for kids and all game fans no matter their age This toy for kids 8+ years old features a red toadstool toy house with lift off-roof and walls to use the crafting table and furniture inside Outside the mushroom house, there is a mooshroom to milk, a chest to discover and a skeleton spider jockey to battle The set includes iconic Minecraft figures, the characters of Alex, Mooshroom and a Spider Jockey This LEGO Minecraft versatile set has a lot to offer, like the tree and chest area that can be reconfigured to make different layouts Give players a new way to enjoy their favourite game with LEGO Minecraft sets bringing characters, scenes and features to life brick by brick 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO Harry Potter Expecto Patronum 2-in-1 Set Build Stag and Wolf Animal Figures Build-Rebuild-and-Display Model Magical Gifts for Teenage Girls Boys Women Men 76414
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Harry Potter Expecto Patronum 2-in-1 Set Build Stag and Wolf Animal Figures Build-Rebuild-and-Display Model Magical Gifts for Teenage Girls Boys Women Men 76414 here: ℹ️: The striking figures make magical Harry Potter bedroom accessories pieces, and a great addition to any Wizarding World memorabilia collection Dive into the world of LEGO Harry Potter buildable toys that let wizards, witches and Muggles role-play iconic scenes, make up their own adventures or display the models The LEGO Harry Potter toy set includes Professor Remus Lupin and Harry Potter minifigures with a wand accessory for a spell-casting effect This LEGO 2in1 figures set makes a magical anytime Wizarding World gift for teenage girls, boys and all fans aged 14+ who love Harry Potter With this 2in1 LEGO Harry Potter Expecto Patronum figures set, fans can build either Harry Potter’s stag or Professor Remus Lupin’s wolf Patronus The Stag Patronus has posable legs, translucent light-blue elements for a ghostly look, display stand and space for the Harry Potter minifigure Rebuild the set into a posable Wolf Patronus and a display stand for the Remus Lupin minifigure; an eyecatching piece of Harry Potter decorations 🛒 Buy it now!

item.title: LEGO Technic Mercedes-AMG F1 W14 E Performance Set for Adults to Build Scale Race Car Model Building Kit Collectible Home or Office Décor Father s Day Treat Gifts for men Women Him or Her 42171
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Technic Mercedes-AMG F1 W14 E Performance Set for Adults to Build Scale Race Car Model Building Kit Collectible Home or Office Décor Father s Day Treat Gifts for men Women Him or Her 42171 here: ℹ️: 3D building instructions – The LEGO Builder app lets you save sets, track your progress, zoom in and rotate your model car in 3D Test the steering – Features include slick tyres, plus steering that can be controlled using the steering wheel or the knob on top of the model car A racing car gift project for adults – This model car kit makes a rewarding Fathers Day gift for dad, birthday present for men and women, or as a just-because treat for adult fans of motorsport who enjoy challenging projects Authentic features – Includes the differential and 6-cylinder engine with moving pistons, plus an opening wing inspired by the real-world car’s DRS Mercedes F1 model car – This LEGO Technic Mercedes-AMG F1 W14 E Performance model kit for adults to build is packed with authentic details Display piece – With authentic livery details, this LEGO set for adults can be admired from every angle, and makes a great home or office décor piece 🛒 Buy it now!

item.title: LEGO Harry Potter Hogwarts: Room of Requirement Castle Toy for 8 Plus Year Old Kids Boys and Girls with Transforming Fire Serpent Figure Deathly Hallows Modular Building Set 76413
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Harry Potter Hogwarts: Room of Requirement Castle Toy for 8 Plus Year Old Kids Boys and Girls with Transforming Fire Serpent Figure Deathly Hallows Modular Building Set 76413 here: ℹ️: Includes 5 LEGO Harry Potter minifigures: Harry, Hermione Granger, Draco Malfoy, Blaise Zabini with wands and broomsticks and the Grey Lady The buildable castle toy for 8-plus-year-old girls and boys opens for easy play and includes a removable upper-level room for the Grey Lady, plus accessories and diadem element Makes a magical gift for 8-plus-year-old boys, girls and kids who love the wizarding world or those looking for their next exciting LEGO building challenge This LEGO Harry Potter Hogwarts Castle toy for kids is part of a series of modular sets that combine to create a complete Hogwarts Castle LEGO Hogwarts Castle buildable toy features the Room of Requirement inspired by an iconic Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows - Part 2 scene Kids can discover fun features such as a buildable Fiendfyre figure that can be rebuilt into a fire serpent, a Cornish Pixie and lots more 🛒 Buy it now!

item.title: LEGO Star Wars Stormtrooper Mech Set Buildable Action Figure Model with Jointed Parts Minifigure Cockpit and Large Stud-Shooter Collectible Toy for Kids Aged 6 and Up 75370
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Star Wars Stormtrooper Mech Set Buildable Action Figure Model with Jointed Parts Minifigure Cockpit and Large Stud-Shooter Collectible Toy for Kids Aged 6 and Up 75370 at the following link: ℹ️: Star Wars fans aged 6+ can battle the rebels with the LEGO Star Wars Stormtrooper Mech buildable toy figure set, with jointed parts and minifigure This LEGO Star Wars set, part of a series of collectible mechs, can be combined with others like the 75368 Darth Vader Mech (sold separately) The Star Wars figure has posable hands, arms, legs and feet, a minifigure cockpit, stud-shooting blaster and a clip for the minifigure’s blaster Designed to be easy to build, this LEGO Star Wars mech action figure provides children with quick fun and is ideal for play and display The LEGO Builder app features intuitive building instructions and tools like 3D zoom and rotate, plus the option to monitor progress and save sets 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO Technic PEUGEOT 9X8 24H Le Mans Hybrid Hypercar Iconic Racing Car Model Kit For Adults to Build 1:10 Scale Collectible Advanced Motorsport Set Gift for Men Women Him or Her 42156
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Technic PEUGEOT 9X8 24H Le Mans Hybrid Hypercar Iconic Racing Car Model Kit For Adults to Build 1:10 Scale Collectible Advanced Motorsport Set Gift for Men Women Him or Her 42156 at the following link: ℹ️: Treat yourself or a car lover to iconic advanced LEGO sets for adults which make great gifts for men and women, plus they offer a creative building project with a collectible car model Number of Pieces: 1,775 Add finishing touches to your model car with livery graphics and PEUGEOT and sponsor logos, then display the model as a tribute to your passion Build the LEGO race car hybrid system with a V6 piston engine, opening doors, steering and suspension and rear designed especially for this model Celebrate 100 years of Le Mans in 2023 with this authentic LEGO Technic PEUGEOT 9X8 24H Le Mans Hybrid Hypercar model building kit for adults The LEGO racing car includes LEGO Technic light elements that glow in the dark to capture the atmosphere from a real 24-hour race With this 1:10 scale LEGO race car set, youll enjoy a rewarding project, recreating details that reflect the latest innovations in auto racing 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO | Disney Princess Moana s Wayfinding Boat Set Building Toy with Moana and Sina Mini-Dolls plus a Dolphin Figure Creative Gift for Kids Girls and Boys Aged 6 Plus 43210
item.description: You can find LEGO | Disney Princess Moana s Wayfinding Boat Set Building Toy with Moana and Sina Mini-Dolls plus a Dolphin Figure Creative Gift for Kids Girls and Boys Aged 6 Plus 43210 with a discount here: ℹ️: Epic adventures await with this LEGO | Disney Princess Moana buildable toy set, featuring a boat with a sail, 2 mini-dolls and a dolphin figure Includes Moana and her mother Sina LEGO mini-doll figures, plus a dolphin figure for kids to play out scenes from the Film or create their own The Disney princess buildable toy also includes a large deck with a removable shelter containing 2 beds and a small fire lamp element Disney Princess fans will love this buildable toy playset with an iconic toy boat as a birthday gift or any-time treat for girls and boys aged 6+ years old The eye-catching, buildable Catamaran toy boat for 6-plus-year-old girls and boys features a printed sail that shows stories of the traditional Motunui people Lots of play-inspiring accessories are included in the set, like an oar for the boat, drums for Moana to play on and coconut LEGO food elements 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO Star Wars Chewbacca Set Collectible Wookiee Figure with Bowcaster and Minifigure Return of the Jedi 40th Anniversary Model Kit for Adults Father s Day Treat Gift for Men & Women 75371
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Star Wars Chewbacca Set Collectible Wookiee Figure with Bowcaster and Minifigure Return of the Jedi 40th Anniversary Model Kit for Adults Father s Day Treat Gift for Men & Women 75371 here: ℹ️: The Chewbacca LEGO Star Wars figure includes a brick-built bowcaster, a bandolier, a built-in display stand and and informative character plaque Number of Pieces: 2,319 This LEGO Star Wars collectible model building kit for adults and teens includes a Chewbacca LEGO Star Wars minifigure with a stud-shooting bowcaster Channel your creative Force with this LEGO Star Wars model: recreate the famous Wookies hairy body in LEGO style, with bandolier and giant bowcaster Celebrate 40 years of Star Wars: Return of the Jedi and the heroic Wookiee with this detailed 2,319 piece LEGO Star Wars Chewbacca figure for adults Collectible LEGO Star Wars sets for adults are designed for you, the discerning hobbyist who enjoys mindful, creative projects to relax, plus they make great Star Wars-themed Fathers Day gifts for dad Build this cool LEGO Star Wars set for adults and display the 46 cm tall Star Wars figure in his iconic action pose as a home or office decoration 🛒 Buy it now!

item.title: LEGO Harry Potter The Shrieking Shack & Whomping Willow 2 in 1 Wizarding World Toy with 6 Character Minifigures The Prisoner of Azkaban Set Gifts for Kids Girls & Boys 76407
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Harry Potter The Shrieking Shack & Whomping Willow 2 in 1 Wizarding World Toy with 6 Character Minifigures The Prisoner of Azkaban Set Gifts for Kids Girls & Boys 76407 here: ℹ️: This LEGO Harry Potter buildable toy is packed with features: Whomping Willow spins and its branches bend to strike and pick up the minifigures With this LEGO Harry Potter 2 in 1 set, kids can recreate 2 classic locations from the Movies: the Shrieking Shack and the Whomping Willow Accessories in the set include wands and a lantern, plus there are 4 random wizard cards to collect (out of 16 in total) Makes a great Harry Potter gift idea: as a birthday, holiday or any occasion treat for kids, boys and girls aged 9 plus and fans of the Wizarding World adventures The shrieking shack has boarded windows, a living room with a seat and a picture on the wall, plus a bedroom with a map, piano and a fireplace Kids can reenact scenes from Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban as they enter the Shrieking Shack through the secret passageway to save Ron Includes 6 LEGO Harry Potter minifigures: Harry, Hermione, Ron Weasley, Sirius Black, Peter Pettigrew and Remus Lupin who turns into a werewolf 🛒 Buy it now!

item.title: LEGO Star Wars AT-TE Walker Poseable Toy Revenge of the Sith Set Gift for Kids Boys & Girls with 3 212th Clone Troopers Dwarf Spider & Battle Droid Figures 75337
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Star Wars AT-TE Walker Poseable Toy Revenge of the Sith Set Gift for Kids Boys & Girls with 3 212th Clone Troopers Dwarf Spider & Battle Droid Figures 75337 at the following link: ℹ️: Kids can use the extendable handle to lift and move the AT-TE, plus the model also has 2 detailed Clone Trooper cabins that open for easy play This LEGO Star Wars building toy features AT-TE Walker with space for up to 7 minifigures, 360-degree-rotating heavy blaster cannon and more The set also features a detachable minifigure cockpit and a seat for the 212th Clone Gunner, 6 blaster cannons, 2 thermal detonators and more The Star Wars buildable toy also includes 3 Battle Droid figures, a buildable Dwarf Spider Droid figure and loads of cool weapons This LEGO Star Wars set makes an exciting birthday gift for 9-plus-year-old kids, boys and girls who are fans of the Obi-Wan Kenobi series Includes 5 LEGO Star Wars minifigures: Commander Cody, a 212th Clone Gunner and 3 212th Clone Troopers for kids to recreate epic battles Kids can relive epic Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith battles and display this set in their room and show it off to their friends after the play 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO Harry Potter Hogwarts Castle Model Big Collectable Set with the Great Hall Sword of Gryffindor & Chamber of Secrets Wizarding World Gift Idea for Fans 71043
item.description: You can find LEGO Harry Potter Hogwarts Castle Model Big Collectable Set with the Great Hall Sword of Gryffindor & Chamber of Secrets Wizarding World Gift Idea for Fans 71043 with a discount here: ℹ️: Hogwarts Castle features the Great Hall with buildable ‘stained glass windows, house banners, benches, tables, flaming torches and moving staircases Number of Pieces: 6,020 This toy is one of a series of detailed modular sets that can be built, combined and rearranged to create kids own Hogwarts Castle model, and makes a great Harry Potter-themed Birthday gift for kids aged 9+, or a fun Fathers Day gift Buildable microscale model of Hogwarts Castle, hut of Hagrid, Whomping Willow tree and 5 boats Accessory elements include the Sword of Gryffindor, Helga Hufflepuff´s cup, wands, potions, house banners, flames, a cauldron and 2 magnifying glasses.

item.title: LEGO Technic John Deere 948L-II Skidder Set Large 1 492-Piece Construction Vehicle Toy with Pneumatic Functions and 4 Wheel Drive Model Building Kit for Engineering Enthusiasts Gift Idea 42157

item.title: LEGO 76255 Marvel The New Guardians Ship Buildable Guardians of the Galaxy Volume 3 Spaceship Toy with Mantis Drax & Star-Lord Minifigures Super Hero Set
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO 76255 Marvel The New Guardians Ship Buildable Guardians of the Galaxy Volume 3 Spaceship Toy with Mantis Drax & Star-Lord Minifigures Super Hero Set here: ℹ️: Kids can blast off with the Guardians of the Galaxy Volume 3 crew with this LEGO Marvel set, featuring a buildable spaceship toy and 5 minifigures The super hero space building toy also features a weapons store and 2 small spaceship building toys that can detach from the main ship The buildable Guardians of the Galaxy spaceship toy features an opening cockpit for 3 minifigures and a secret compartment for another minifigure The spaceship can be picked up and ‘whooshed’ through space and, when the action is over, it can be displayed on its stand in any kid’s room LEGO Marvel Guardians of the Galaxy building toy makes a great Marvel super hero-themed gift for kids aged 10+ and fans of cool space toys Includes 5 LEGO Marvel minifigures from Guardians of the Galaxy Volume 3: Mantis, Drax, Star-Lord, Nebula and Adam Warlock plus cool accessories 🛒 Buy it now!

item.title: LEGO Marvel Wolverine Construction Figure X-Men Action Figure Set with 6 Claw Elements Play and Display Iconic Superheroes Collection Collectible Toys 76257
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Marvel Wolverine Construction Figure X-Men Action Figure Set with 6 Claw Elements Play and Display Iconic Superheroes Collection Collectible Toys 76257 here: ℹ️: There are more LEGO Marvel action figures to collect, including the Captain America (76258) and lots of LEGO Marvel buildable toys to expand play Give kids their own mega, movable mutant with this iconic LEGO Marvel buildable toy Wolverine action figure for boys, girls and all fans aged 8+ The 327-piece LEGO buildable toy Wolverine construction figure features film-accurate details, including extended claws and movable joints Kids can zoom in and rotate sets in 3D, save sets and track progress using the intuitive LEGO Builder app for smart devices Kids can adjust the figure to recreate the X-Men characters action poses as they play out missions from the Marvel films and their own adventures 🛒 Buy it now!

item.title: LEGO Marvel Sanctum Sanctorum 3-Floor Modular Building Set Model Kit for Adults to Build with Doctor Strange and Iron Man Minifigures Avengers Infinity Saga Collectible Gift for Men & Women 76218
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Marvel Sanctum Sanctorum 3-Floor Modular Building Set Model Kit for Adults to Build with Doctor Strange and Iron Man Minifigures Avengers Infinity Saga Collectible Gift for Men & Women 76218 here: ℹ️: The top floor houses the museum of mystical collections with Cloak of Levitation, a chest, spear, 2 axes and a shield, plus other magical items This LEGO Marvel collectible model recreates the movie magic and makes a great home decor piece or Marvel-themed gift idea for men and women This LEGO model of Doctor Stranges residence features a 3-storey modular building with 4 facades, lots of movie details and 9 LEGO Marvel minifigures The middle floor library has 2 chairs, a lamp and a hidden portal; the 3 dimension tiles can be changed using the levers on the back of the house Fans can recreate and celebrate classic scenes from Marvel Studios’ Avengers: Infinity War and Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness with this LEGO set for adults Number of Pieces: 2,708 With LEGO Marvel Doctor Strange, Wong, Iron Man, Spider-Man, Black Maw, Master Mordo, Sinister Strange, Dead Strange, Scarlet Witch minifigures The ground floor features traditional staircase, medical degree and a green armchair; many of the models walls can be reconfigured 🛒 Buy it now!

item.title: LEGO Minecraft The Iron Golem Fortress Buildable Castle Toy which Transforms into Large Figure with 7 Characters includ. Crystal Knight Skeleton Horsemen and a Charged Creeper 21250
item.description: You can find LEGO Minecraft The Iron Golem Fortress Buildable Castle Toy which Transforms into Large Figure with 7 Characters includ. Crystal Knight Skeleton Horsemen and a Charged Creeper 21250 with a discount here: ℹ️: This LEGO Minecraft buildable castle toy makes a fun-filled birthday gift for kids, boys and girls aged 9+ and offers endless play possibilities to experience the game in a new way Kids can use the LEGO Builder app for an immersive building experience; they can zoom in and rotate models in 3D, save sets and track progress Includes Crystal and Golden Knights, Minecraft iron golem, Charged Creeper and 2 skeleton horsemen Minecraft figures, plus a gold sword and bows Kids build a Minecraft LEGO fortress toy with functional interiors and exteriors, then reconfigure it into an iron golem with huge movable arms This Minecraft buildable toys for boys, girls and all fans makes a cool display for kids to show-off with pride when the days play is over LEGO Minecraft The Iron Golem Fortress features a buildable castle toy that transforms into a Giant Golem, with loads of mobs and 2 heroes 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO 71409 Super Mario Big Spike’s Cloudtop Challenge Expansion Set Toys for Kids Boys and Girls with 3 Figures including Boomerang Bro and Piranha Plant Collectible Giftsc Multicolor
item.description: You’ve got LEGO 71409 Super Mario Big Spike’s Cloudtop Challenge Expansion Set Toys for Kids Boys and Girls with 3 Figures including Boomerang Bro and Piranha Plant Collectible Giftsc Multicolor at the following link: ℹ️: Lego Super Mario expansion sets make great Birthday, Christmas gifts or any time toys for kids who own Lego Super Mario Starter course This Lego Super Mario buildable toy expansion set requires one of the Lego Super Mario Starter Courses (71360, 71387 or 71403) to play Unlock the fun with the Lego Super Mario companion app - For a list of compatible Android and iOS devices Players then gain Super Star Block power and jump on the seesaw to defeat the Piranha Plant, or allow kids to invent their own levels This Lego Super Mario expansion set features 3 popular enemies, Big Spike, Boomerang Bro and a Piranha Plant for new sky level challenges This Lego Super Mario buildable toy game let kids recreate the iconic game : Jump on the orange Mushroom Trampolines to get to the Boomerang Bro Players earn digital coins for helping Lego Mario, Lego Luigi or Lego Peach (figures not included) dodge the spiked roller thrown by the Big Spike 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO Marvel Captain America Construction Figure Buildable Toy with Shield Avengers Collection Play and Display Superhero Bedroom Accessory Birthday Gift for Kids Boys Girls Aged 8+ 76258
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Marvel Captain America Construction Figure Buildable Toy with Shield Avengers Collection Play and Display Superhero Bedroom Accessory Birthday Gift for Kids Boys Girls Aged 8+ 76258 here: ℹ️: Young superheroes can download the LEGO Builder app for an immersive building experience, with digital tools to enhance the building experience Great for group play; kids can collect other LEGO Marvel collectible action figures in the series, including Wolverine (76257) The Avengers figure features movable shoulder, arm, hip and leg joints and includes Captain Americas shield, which attaches to his hands or back Put the iconic leader of The Avengers into the hands of kids aged 8+ with this posable LEGO Marvel Captain America action figure building toy With this LEGO Marvel buildable toy, kids can position and pose the Captain America Avengers figure as they recreate missions from the movies 🛒 Buy it now!

item.title: LEGO Technic Liebherr Crawler Crane LR 13000 Set Build the Ultimate Remote Controlled Construction Vehicle with Control+ App Winch System and Luffing Jib Large Model for Adults Men Women 42146
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Technic Liebherr Crawler Crane LR 13000 Set Build the Ultimate Remote Controlled Construction Vehicle with Control+ App Winch System and Luffing Jib Large Model for Adults Men Women 42146 here: ℹ️: This impressive LEGO Technic remote control set of one of the world’s most powerful cranes is one of the largest models in the LEGO Technic range This model kit for adults to build features a large model crane with 2 smart hubs and 6 large motors - 12 LR AA batteries (not included) are required Explore tank steering, rotating turntable, luffing jib, winch, load-sensing features and 24 weight elements that provide over 0.

item.title: LEGO 43221 Disney 100 Years of Disney Animation Icons Character Wall Art Craft Set 72 Fun Mosaic Designs to Create Includes Exclusive Mickey Mouse Artist Minifigure Toy for Kids
item.description: You’ve got LEGO 43221 Disney 100 Years of Disney Animation Icons Character Wall Art Craft Set 72 Fun Mosaic Designs to Create Includes Exclusive Mickey Mouse Artist Minifigure Toy for Kids at the following link: ℹ️: Includes a Disney’s Mickey Mouse LEGO minifigure with a torso and legs decorated exclusively for this set, holding a brush and palette This LEGO Disney 100 years of Disney Animation Icons craft set lets kids 6+ pick from 72 Disney designs to create a collage LEGO art to display The LEGO Disney toy mosaic set includes 12 8x8 plates, picture frame, hanger elements and loads of tiles to build up to 12 Disney icons at once With this Disney crafts set, kids can choose to create their favourite icons and display their art with pride as wall art or bedroom decoration With an instruction booklet to guide designs, this Disney art set is great for group play and helps to develop vital life skills through fun Includes designs such as Snow White, Princess Jasmine, Frozens Olaf and Elsa, Mickey and Minnie Mouse, Belle, Ariel The Little Mermaid, and more; perfect for Disney fans Give this premium LEGO wall art set as a creative Disney gift to kids, girls and boys aged 6+, family or friends with a passion for Disney toys, characters, art and design 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO Technic THE BATMAN – BATCYCLE Set Collectible Toy Motorbike Scale Model Building Kit of the Iconic Super Hero Bike from 2022 Movie 42155
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Technic THE BATMAN – BATCYCLE Set Collectible Toy Motorbike Scale Model Building Kit of the Iconic Super Hero Bike from 2022 Movie 42155 at the following link: ℹ️: This collectible LEGO THE BATMAN - BATCYCLE features a supporting kickstand so kids can display their build with pride on a shelf or desk The Batman Bike is packed with realistic features including steering, suspension and a drive chain that connects the H4 engine to the rear wheel Kids and fans can capture the spirit of the DC superhero and build the toy motorbike piece by piece then recreate their favourite Batman moments Fans can recreate an iconic vehicle with this LEGO Technic BATCYCLE toy motorbike model building kit, as seen in the 2022 movie: THE BATMAN This motorbike model building kit makes a great Batman gift idea for kids aged 9+ and fans of super heroes, toy vehicles and comic book culture 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO Super Mario Peach’s Castle Expansion Set Buildable Game Toys Gifts for Kids Girls & Boys Aged 8 Plus with Time Block and Figures to Combine with Starter Course 71408
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Super Mario Peach’s Castle Expansion Set Buildable Game Toys Gifts for Kids Girls & Boys Aged 8 Plus with Time Block and Figures to Combine with Starter Course 71408 at the following link: ℹ️: This Super mario building toy includes a Time Block, Peach stained-glass window, Bob-omb painting with a hidden Action Tag, cake with a Goomba hiding inside and more Also includes a Special Pipe: Peachs Castle, broken bridge and 5 LEGO Super Mario figures – Bowser, Ludwig, Toadette, a Goomba and a Bob-omb Kids help LEGO Mario, LEGO Luigi or LEGO Peach (figures not included) activate the slider platform to spin the wall and reveal Bowser The LEGO Super Mario companion app offers instructions and more ideas: visit LEGO.

item.title: LEGO | Disney The Enchanted Treehouse with 13 Mini-Doll Figures including Princess Jasmine Elsa Anna & Moana 2-Level Buildable Toy Gift for Kids Girls Boys Aged 7 Plus Disney 100 Set 43215
item.description: You can find LEGO | Disney The Enchanted Treehouse with 13 Mini-Doll Figures including Princess Jasmine Elsa Anna & Moana 2-Level Buildable Toy Gift for Kids Girls Boys Aged 7 Plus Disney 100 Set 43215 with a discount here: ℹ️: This big LEGO set includes a 2-level treehouse, a waterfall with slide and hidden cave, a zip line, hidden staircase, canoe and a campfire Kids can celebrate Disneys 100th anniversary with this LEGO | Disney playset featuring a 2-level treehouse toy and 13 iconic heroine and Princess mini-doll figures With this Disney Tree House playset kids can role-play reading, taking a canoe ride, honing their warrior skills or searching for hidden treasure This LEGO | buildable toy playset makes a fun Disney gift for girls, boys and kids aged 7+, a cool room decor and addition to any Disney Princess collection The princess dolls house set also includes: Princess Jasmine from Aladdin, Encantos Mirabel, Belle from Beauty and the Beast, Frozens Anna and Elsa Plus Pocahontas, Alice from Alice in Wonderand, Wendy and Tinker Bell from Peter Pan LEGO | Disney mini-doll figures, plus lots of accessories With LEGO | Disney mini-doll figures of iconic heroine characters: Mulan, Raya from Raya and the Last Dragon, Moana, Princess and the Frogs Tiana 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO Star Wars Emperor s Throne Room Diorama Return of the Jedi 40th Anniversary Lightsaber Dual Set for Adults Gift for Men & Women with Luke Skywalker and Darth Vader Minifigures 75352

item.title: LEGO Creator 3 in 1 Adorable Dogs Set with Dachshund Pug Poodle Figures and More Breeds Animal Building Toy for Kids aged 7 and Up Gift for Dog Lovers 31137
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Creator 3 in 1 Adorable Dogs Set with Dachshund Pug Poodle Figures and More Breeds Animal Building Toy for Kids aged 7 and Up Gift for Dog Lovers 31137 at the following link: ℹ️: Each group of dogs also come with accessories such as a bowl, rubber bone, ball, hairbrush, toy rabbit or dog-walking lead to add extra fun The toy pets can also be transformed into a miniature schnauzer and a pug, or a husky and a long-haired dachshund for hours of creative play A great treat for dog lovers and a fab gift for animal-loving kids aged 7+ years old to play with or to create fun displays in their bedrooms For unlimited creative fun, let the little ones discover other LEGO Creator 3 in 1 sets: Vintage Motorbike (31135) and Exotic Parrot (31136) Young animal lovers will love building characterful canines: beagle, poodle and labrador dog figures and role-playing caring for the toy pets Kids can create 3 different groups of dogs with this LEGO Creator 3in1 Adorable Dogs toy building set, featuring animal figures from 7 cute breeds All of the toy dogs from the 3 different groups have posable heads, tails and ears and can fold their legs and paws to sit or stretch out 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO Creator 3 in 1 Exotic Parrot to Frog to Fish Animal Figures Building Toy Creative Toys for Kids Aged 7 and up 31136
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Creator 3 in 1 Exotic Parrot to Frog to Fish Animal Figures Building Toy Creative Toys for Kids Aged 7 and up 31136 here: ℹ️: The parrot can be transformed into a toy frog with posable legs or into a LEGO fish with movable fins and a seabed for creative adventures This LEGO Creator 3in1 animal toy set features 3 animals for kids 7+ years old: a parrot toy perched on a branch, a playful frog and a toy fish Kids can choose their building adventure with 3 LEGO Creator animal figures or fire up their imagination and create a new animal with the bricks The toy parrot is richly coloured and comes with jointed parts that allow it to rotate its body on the branch and move its wings and tail The range of 3in1 LEGO Creator building toys is full of fun; dont miss the Space Shuttle (31134) and Beach Camper Van (31138) sets The easy-to-follow picture guide makes construction easy and fun, plus digital building instructions can also be found in the LEGO Builder app With details such as the parrots branch covered in flowers, this building toy set will look awesome on display in kids rooms when play is over 🛒 Buy it now!

item.title: LEGO 71407 Super Mario Cat Peach Suit and Frozen Tower Expansion Set Buildable Game with Castle Toy and Costume plus Kamek & Toad Figures Collectible Gifts for Kids Girls & Boys
item.description: You can find LEGO 71407 Super Mario Cat Peach Suit and Frozen Tower Expansion Set Buildable Game with Castle Toy and Costume plus Kamek & Toad Figures Collectible Gifts for Kids Girls & Boys with a discount here: ℹ️: Features 3 LEGO Super Mario characters – Cat Goomba, Kamek and Toad figures for LEGO Peach (not included) to interact with Players can then topple Kamek from the tower and break Toad out of the ice enclosure (71360, 71387 or 71403 Starter Course is required for play) Includes a Cat Suit toy costume that Lego Peach figure (not included) can wear and win digital coins; it also triggers unique reactions With this LEGO Super Mario building toy, kids can release the Coin Block from ‘ice’, grab the yellow fruit, knock ‘ice’ off the tower and activate the POW Block LEGO Super Mario Princess Peach buildable game features a 3-level castle toy with ice elements, flowers, POW block and coin collecting challenges Makes a great Super Mario-themed birthday, or any time gift for kids aged 7+ who own one of the LEGO Super Mario Starter Courses which is needed for play Find instructions and ideas on the LEGO Super Mario companion app; for a list of compatible Android and iOS devices, visit LEGO.

item.title: LEGO NINJAGO Zane’s Ice Dragon Creature 2in1 Dragon Toy to Action Figure Warrior Model Building Kit Construction Set for Kids Boys & Girls with 5 Minifigures 71786
item.description: You can find LEGO NINJAGO Zane’s Ice Dragon Creature 2in1 Dragon Toy to Action Figure Warrior Model Building Kit Construction Set for Kids Boys & Girls with 5 Minifigures 71786 with a discount here: ℹ️: This 973-piece toy for kids is a great gift for 10 plus years old boys and girls and makes be a fun model building kit bonding experience Kids can role-play as villainous green bone warrior trio and gather around the brick-built temple Skeleton Warrior hangout to plot their attack In this construction set, kids are awarded 2 banners to display on the back of the NINJAGO dragon figure or the Dragon warrior action figure The ice dragon toy figure has 6 legs, sharp ice claws, a long tail, horns and wings with golden blades and can be rebuilt into a dragon on 2 legs This 2in1 LEGO NINJAGO building toy set features a posable ice dragon toy that can be rebuilt into an awesome dragon warrior action figure Includes 5 LEGO NINJAGO minifigures: Zane and Pixal with ninja swords to fight against Bone Knight, Bone Warrior and Bone King, all with weapons 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO Speed Champions Lamborghini Countach Race Car Toy Model Replica Collectible Building Set with Racing Driver Minifigure 76908
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Speed Champions Lamborghini Countach Race Car Toy Model Replica Collectible Building Set with Racing Driver Minifigure 76908 at the following link: ℹ️: The LEGO Building Instructions app for smartphones and tablets lets you zoom, rotate and view models from all angles as you build LEGO Speed Champions race car toy models give kids the chance to build, play with & display some of the world’s most iconic vehicle replicas The legendary, iconic 1970’s supercar is revered by fans from around the world for its stunning design and top-notch performance Build your very own Lamborghini Countach, show it off to friends and enjoy race action against other vehicles from the Speed Champions range This iconic race car toy for kids aged 8+ is a perfect birthday or any occasion gift for boys and girls who love toy sports cars!

item.title: LEGO - Disney and Pixar ‘Up’ House Buildable Toy with Balloons Carl Russell and Dug Figures Collectible Model Set Disney s 100th Anniversary Series Iconic Gift Idea Multicolor
item.description: You can find LEGO - Disney and Pixar ‘Up’ House Buildable Toy with Balloons Carl Russell and Dug Figures Collectible Model Set Disney s 100th Anniversary Series Iconic Gift Idea Multicolor with a discount here: ℹ️: This LEGO | Disney and Pixar building toy features the house from Up with balloons, Carl and Russell LEGO minifigures plus Dug LEGO dog figure Kids and fans will cherish this LEGO set celebrating Disneys 100th Anniversary as a special Disney gift with its many details and fun build The Up house model building kit includes a chimney, bedroom, porch and living room with fireplace, plus lots of recognisable film details The LEGO Builder app guides kids on an adventure of their own, with tools to zoom and rotate 3D models, save sets and monitor progress Accessories like the balloon inflator, squirrel figure, wilderness explorer backpack and the adventure book let fans relive their favourite scenes This LEGO | Disney and Pixar house building set is made for endless play sessions or a colourful, eye-catching display in kids’ (or adults’!

item.title: LEGO Minecraft The Pumpkin Farm Set Buildable House Toy with a Frog Boat Treasure Chest plus Steve and Witch Figures Swamp Biome Action Toys Gift for Kids Boys Girls 21248
item.description: You can find LEGO Minecraft The Pumpkin Farm Set Buildable House Toy with a Frog Boat Treasure Chest plus Steve and Witch Figures Swamp Biome Action Toys Gift for Kids Boys Girls 21248 with a discount here: ℹ️: LEGO Minecraft The Pumpkin Farm set features a buildable toy Minecraft house from the games swamp biome with character figures and accessories With this Minecraft farm toy set kids build a house, tend a pumpkin patch, battle a potion-flinging witch, sail a toy boat and make a pumpkin pie The set features one of the most popular Minecraft characters, Steve, with a hoe and a bow, plus a witch with potions and a frog with frogspawn LEGO Minecraft sets make great gifts for kids, boy and girls, aged 8+ and let the young Minecraft fans experience action-packed adventures Kids build pumpkin-shaped house, the pumpkin patch, Minecraft crafting table, furnace, a frog light, a toy boat and a treasure chest 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO Technic Bugatti Bolide Racing Car Model Building Set Race Engineering Toys Collectible Iconic Sports Vehicle Construction Kit for 9 Plus Year Old Kids Boys & Girls 42151
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Technic Bugatti Bolide Racing Car Model Building Set Race Engineering Toys Collectible Iconic Sports Vehicle Construction Kit for 9 Plus Year Old Kids Boys & Girls 42151 here: ℹ️: With yellow and black colour theme and sticker detail that adds the finishing touch, this toy car model looks great on display in kids’ rooms With realistic movement and authentic features based on the original car model, the build features a working W16 engine, steering and scissor doors Motorsport fans and race car enthusiasts can explore the stunning design of the Bugatti Bolide with this LEGO Technic model race car building kit The Bugatti Bolide stretches the possibilities of motorsport technology; let your kids build this LEGO Technic model of the iconic racing car This LEGO Technic Bugatti Bolide car toy model building set makes a great gift for boys and girls aged 9 plus and helps to introduce kids to engineering 🛒 Buy it now!

item.title: LEGO Harry Potter Hogwarts Astronomy Tower Castle Toy Playset for Kids Girls & Boys with 8 Character Minifigures including Herione and Ron plus Hedwig the Owl Figure Wizarding World Gifts 75969
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Harry Potter Hogwarts Astronomy Tower Castle Toy Playset for Kids Girls & Boys with 8 Character Minifigures including Herione and Ron plus Hedwig the Owl Figure Wizarding World Gifts 75969 at the following link: ℹ️: Kids can build the multi-level LEGO Hogwarts Castle Astronomy Tower and explore all it has to offer while recreating scenes from the Harry Potter movies Also includes a toy Hedwig the owl figure, plus accessories like letters, wands, book of potions, broomstick, cakes, wine glasses, lanterns, torches and candles This LEGO Harry Potter Hogwarts Castle buildable toy makes a magical birthday gift for a son or daughter, or a surprise toy treat or boys and girls aged 9+, and all kids who love the Wizarding World adventures This LEGO Harry Potter building toy for kids aged 9+ features a Hogwarts castle Astronomy Tower model, 8 minifigures and loads of magical fun Great for role play; kids can search the sky with the telescope, check the mandrakes in the greenhouse, chill in the Ravenclaw dorm or join Slughorns party Includes LEGO Harry Potter, Hermione Granger, Ron Weasley, Luna Lovegood, Neville Longbottom, Draco Malfoy, Lavender Brown and Professor Slughorn minifgures 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO 21054 Architecture The White House Display Model Building Kit Landmark Collection Set for Adults Collectible Home Décor Gift Idea for Men Women Him or Her
item.description: You’ve got LEGO 21054 Architecture The White House Display Model Building Kit Landmark Collection Set for Adults Collectible Home Décor Gift Idea for Men Women Him or Her at the following link: ℹ️: Features details like the Executive Residence, West Wing, East Wing and connecting colonnades, the Jacqueline Kennedy Garden and Rose Garden The Architecture display model of The White House beautifully captures the neoclassical design and splendour of this world-famous residence Number of Pieces: 1,483 Enjoy building a true American icon: The White House, occupied by every United States president since 1800, with this classic set for adults The collectible model can easily be divided into 3 sections for closer inspection of the architectural details Includes clear instructions so even LEGO newcomers can build with confidence, and a coffee-table-style booklet telling The White House story 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO Marvel King Namor’s Throne Room 76213 Building Kit; Black Panther Underwater Submarine Adventures; Birthday Gift Construction Toy for Super-Hero Fans and Kids Aged 7+ 355 Pieces
item.description: You can find LEGO Marvel King Namor’s Throne Room 76213 Building Kit; Black Panther Underwater Submarine Adventures; Birthday Gift Construction Toy for Super-Hero Fans and Kids Aged 7+ 355 Pieces with a discount here: ℹ️: The submarine toy for kids features stud shooters and King Namors throne room is decorated with seaweed, fish and an opening shark jaw throne This LEGO Black Panther submarine building toy for kids, boys and girls aged 7 years old makes a great birthday gift for Marvel Avengers fans This LEGO Marvel building toy features a toy submarine and King Namor’s Throne Room from Marvel Studios Black Panther: Wakanda Forever Connects with all other LEGO Marvel Super Hero sets, plus its compact size makes this Black Panther playset an ideal travel toy - kids can take it anywhere Kids can relive their favourite scenes with their favourite Black Panther characters, and when the action is over, the toys look great on display Kids can play out endless adventures with the 3 LEGO Marvel minifigures of Shuri, Attuma and King Namor, plus cool toy weapons and accessories 🛒 Buy it!
